content.json:
## SQL Best Practices Assessment
Analyze SQL Server assessment results from Log Analytics. Requires a Log Analytics workspace with **SqlAssessment_CL** data.

parameters.name: BpaServerName
parameters.label: Server Name
parameters.query:
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
| extend TargetType = case(asmt[6] == 1, 'Server', asmt[6] == 2, 'Database', '')
| where TargetType == 'Server'
| extend ServerName = replace_string(tostring(asmt[7]), '\\', '#')
| distinct ServerName

content.query:
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
| extend AsmtId = tostring(asmt[1]), CheckId = tostring(asmt[2]), TargetType = case(asmt[6] == 1, 'Server', asmt[6] == 2, 'Database', ''), TargetName = tostring(asmt[7]), Sev = toint(asmt[8])
| join kind=inner (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId = tostring(asmt[1])
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
) on AsmtId
| where Sev >= 0 and TargetType == 'Server'
| extend ServerName = replace_string(tostring(asmt[7]), '\\', '#')
| where ServerName in (dynamic([{BpaServerName}]))
| summarize count() by TargetName
content.title: Issues by Server

content.query:
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
| extend AsmtId = tostring(asmt[1]), CheckId = tostring(asmt[2]), TargetType = case(asmt[6] == 1, 'Server', asmt[6] == 2, 'Database', ''), TargetName = tostring(asmt[7]), Sev = toint(asmt[8])
| join kind=inner (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId = tostring(asmt[1])
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
) on AsmtId
| where Sev >= 0 and TargetType == 'Database'
| extend ServerName = tostring(split(tostring(asmt[7]), ':')[0])
| extend ServerNameFilter = replace_string(ServerName, '\\', '#')
| where ServerNameFilter in (dynamic([{BpaServerName}]))
| summarize count() by TargetName
content.title: Issues by Database

content.query:
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
| extend AsmtId = tostring(asmt[1]), CheckId = tostring(asmt[2]), TargetType = case(asmt[6] == 1, 'Server', asmt[6] == 2, 'Database', ''), TargetName = tostring(asmt[7]),
    Severity = case(asmt[8] == 30, 'High', asmt[8] == 20, 'Medium', asmt[8] == 10, 'Low', asmt[8] == 0, 'Information', 'Passed'),
    Sev = toint(asmt[8])
| join kind=inner (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId = tostring(asmt[1])
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
) on AsmtId
| where Sev >= 0
| extend ServerName = case(TargetType == 'Server', tostring(asmt[7]), tostring(split(tostring(asmt[7]), ':')[0]))
| extend ServerNameFilter = replace_string(ServerName, '\\', '#')
| where ServerNameFilter in (dynamic([{BpaServerName}]))
| summarize count() by Severity, Sev
| order by Sev
content.title: Issues by Severity

content.query:
SqlAssessment_CL
| extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
| extend AsmtId = tostring(asmt[1]), CheckId = tostring(asmt[2]), DisplayString = tostring(asmt[3]), Description = tostring(asmt[4]), HelpLink = tostring(asmt[5]),
    TargetType = case(asmt[6] == 1, 'Server', asmt[6] == 2, 'Database', ''),
    TargetName = tostring(asmt[7]),
    Severity = case(asmt[8] == 30, 'High', asmt[8] == 20, 'Medium', asmt[8] == 10, 'Low', asmt[8] == 0, 'Information', asmt[8] == 1, 'Warning', asmt[8] == 2, 'Critical', 'Passed'),
    Message = tostring(asmt[9]), Sev = toint(asmt[8])
| join kind=inner (
    SqlAssessment_CL
    | extend asmt = parse_csv(RawData)
    | extend AsmtId = tostring(asmt[1])
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by _ResourceId
    | project AsmtId
) on AsmtId
| where Sev >= 0
| extend ServerName = case(TargetType == 'Server', tostring(asmt[7]), tostring(split(tostring(asmt[7]), ':')[0]))
| extend ServerNameFilter = replace_string(ServerName, '\\', '#')
| where ServerNameFilter in (dynamic([{BpaServerName}]))
| where '{bpaSeverity}' == '' or Severity == '{bpaSeverity}'
| order by Sev desc, CheckId
| project TimeGenerated, TargetType, ArcServer = _ResourceId, Severity, CheckId, DisplayString, Description, TargetName
content.title: Assessment Details{bpaSeverity:+ — filtered: {bpaSeverity}}
